ETH_UCY.caveat: Dynamic meta-policy predicts per-source ADE from past-only features and candidate rollout geometry. Train future waypoints are labels only; validation selects safety thresholds; test is evaluated once. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds/true-3D/foundation claim.

TrajNet.caveat: Dynamic meta-policy predicts per-source ADE from past-only features and candidate rollout geometry. Train future waypoints are labels only; validation selects safety thresholds; test is evaluated once. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds/true-3D/foundation claim.
